name: erpAnalysis
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.identifiedComponents.every(c => typeof c.component === 'string' && Number.isFinite(c.latencyMs) && Number.isFinite(c.amplitude))
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data. TWO entry shapes: (1) artifact.data.epochs[] (EegWorkbench.doErp), (2) a single artifact.data.signal + eventOnset (NeuroActionPanel.actErp) — the continuous trace is sliced into a baseline-corrected pre/post epoch around the onset(s) (added 2026-06-28; previously a signal payload returned 'No epoch data.', a dead surface). SNR is CLAMPED to a finite sentinel (9999) so a silent baseline never leaks Infinity. The card reads epochCount/peakAmplitude/snr/snrQuality/baselineRms/peaks/identifiedComponents EXACTLY (the prior peakAmplitudeMicroV/peakLatencyMs/component/baseline fields were never returned — fixed 2026-06-28). A signal with no finite samples is rejected.
